exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your dropshipping forward
items: Research and identify 5-10 profitable product niches with high demand and low competition
Use Google Trends and competitor analysis tools to validate demand for 3-5 specific products in your chosen niche
Source and test 5 specific product samples from potential suppliers to validate quality and marketability
Create detailed competitor profiles for 3-5 successful businesses in your chosen niche
Set up and configure your business structure including LLC registration and business bank account
Research and evaluate 5-10 potential suppliers for your chosen products using verified platforms
